llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: Announces pre-configured Gold Series enterprise server solutions, accelerating deployment times, shortening lead times and time-to-online. Market-proven product families.
Indian investors contributed USD 177 million in March, bringing quarterly total to USD 3 billion, indicating local safe-haven demand.
Opened higher, up 1.80 per cent in early trade, supported by strong global cues.

Reported USD revenue growth of 1.2% QoQ CC (in line with estimates), margins expanded by 10bps QoQ to 25.3% (best in last eight quarters), indicated better growth visibility for FY27E bolstered by healthy deal wins and strategic investments.

Board to consider a proposal for a share buyback on April 15–16; Q4 FY2026 results also scheduled on April 16. Analyst recommends buying with an upside target of ₹225 in the near term, finding support near previous swing low.

Reported 16 per cent increase in sales bookings (pre-sales) for FY26 to a record ₹34,171 crore, highest ever full year booking value and volume by any listed real estate developer in India. Exceeded target of ₹32,500 crore. Strong demand for housing units and strong launch pipeline for FY27.

Potential listing of the holding company on stock exchange could resolve ownership and control questions.

Collaborates with Databricks for enterprise-wide adoption of its data and AI platform to accelerate data and AI transformation across all business clusters, driving enhanced operational efficiency, smarter decision-making, and scalable digital innovation. Will enable intelligent grid management, advanced power planning, improved billing, accurate renewable forecasting, and operational excellence.

Shares surged over 4% after leadership changes (new MD, CFO) and approval of new business expansion initiative with incorporation of RDB Ergoflex LLP into furniture manufacturing, holding a majority stake.

Decisively broken above 8–9 week horizontal resistance zone at ₹976, signalling strong continuation of uptrend. Momentum indicators validate the breakout, with daily RSI trending upward and holding above its reference line, reinforcing bullish bias.

Broken above the upper band of the falling channel at ₹4,770, signalling a continuation of the medium-term uptrend. Price firmly positioned above its 20, 50, 100, and 200-day SMAs, with all key averages trending higher. Closed above the upper Bollinger Band, generating a buy signal. Momentum indicators supportive.

Continues to trend higher on daily and weekly charts, forming higher highs and higher lows, reflecting a strong bullish bias. Firmly positioned above its 20, 50, 100, and 200-day SMAs. Broken above horizontal resistance at ₹172.5. Momentum indicators supportive across all time frames.
Experienced a 2% drop following reported Q4 revenue and net profit increase, contributing to a 1.5% drop in the IT index.
